narrative:
New Franklin 4-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,127 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a modest Republican lean of 5.2 percentage points.
